task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Beach House in Malibu CA (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $12500000.00 and wholesale is $10000000.00. Product features: 4-bedroom contemporary beach house with direct ocean access and panoramic views. Reference: https://www.theagencyre.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Beach House in Malibu CA. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Beach House in Malibu CA. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
